name: Wang Chong

sections.short-biography: Defected to Wei. Lied that Zhuge Liang wanted to exterminate Meng Da’s family.

sections.biography-source-undefined:
Wang Chong was from Guanghan commandery.

He was General of the Ivory Gates and was subordinate to Li Yan. Being despised by Li Yan, he feared punishment and surrendered to Wei. Wei had Wang Chong serve as Grand Administrator of Leling.

full_text:
Wang Chong 王沖
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Chong (王沖). Defected to Wei. Lied that Zhuge Liang wanted to exterminate Meng Da’s family. Wang Chong was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom and the Wei Kingdom.

BiographySource Undefined
Wang Chong was from Guanghan commandery.
He was General of the Ivory Gates and was subordinate to Li Yan. Being despised by Li Yan, he feared punishment and surrendered to Wei. Wei had Wang Chong serve as Grand Administrator of Leling.
